linting.notes: No Java linters configured in pom.xml. The .pre-commit-config.yaml file references golangci-lint and prettier, but there is no Go code in the repository. Prettier may be intended for YAML/JSON formatting but is not actively used. No checkstyle, spotbugs, or PMD plugins configured.

setup_required: Install etcd v3.5.0+ (required for most tests)
mvn -B package -DskipTests (generate sources and resolve dependencies)
testing.mock_patterns: Mock model loaders in com.ibm.watson.modelmesh.example package. Tests use embedded etcd (curator-test) and zookeeper for KV store testing.
testing.notes: Tests use maven-surefire-plugin 3.0.0-M5. Tests do not run in parallel (forkCount=1, reuseForks=false). Full test suite takes >5 minutes to run. Individual tests run quickly (e.g., ProtoSplicerTest completes in <1 second). Many tests require etcd to be available on the system path.

ci.notes: CI runs on pull_request and push to main/release branches. Tests require etcd installation via .github/install-etcd.sh script. Build job creates multi-arch Docker images (amd64, arm64, ppc64le, s390x) but only runs after tests pass. Java 21 (Temurin distribution) is used in CI.

build.notes: Project uses protobuf code generation via protobuf-maven-plugin. Generated sources are created in target/generated-sources/protobuf. Full build with tests: mvn -B package. Java 21 is required (configured in maven-compiler-plugin with <release>21</release>).

conventions.test_naming: JUnit 5 conventions: class names end with 'Test', test methods annotated with @Test
conventions.import_style: Standard Java imports, grouped by package
conventions.notes: 41 test classes found. Test classes extend AbstractModelMeshTest or AbstractModelMeshClusterTest base classes. Example test runners in com.ibm.watson.modelmesh.example package.

test_commands.notes: Full test suite times out after 5 minutes. Tests start but take very long to complete all 41 test classes.
Single test SUCCESS: 2 tests run, 0 failures, 0 errors, 0 skipped in 0.363s

container_recipe.notes: etcd must be installed but does not need to be running as a service - tests start their own embedded instances. Full test suite is very slow (>5 min), recommend running individual test classes or specific tests for faster feedback.
